title: Mock Test 51 - Advanced Modals (needn't, used to, ought to, dare)
description: Advanced Modal Verbs নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Needn't, Used to, Ought to, Dare, Had better, Would rather, Needn't have + V3, Didn't need to ইত্যাদি।

questions.question: 'Needn't' modal-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Needn't' = need not = প্রয়োজন নেই। যেমন: You needn't worry.

questions.question: 'Used to' modal-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Used to' = past habit (অতীত অভ্যাস যা এখন নেই)। যেমন: I used to smoke.

questions.question: 'Ought to' modal-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Ought to' = moral duty/obligation। যেমন: You ought to respect your parents.

questions.question: 'Dare' modal-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Dare' = have the courage to। যেমন: I dare not go there alone.

questions.question: 'Had better' modal-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Had better' = should/উচিত (strong advice, with consequences)। যেমন: You had better see a doctor.

questions.question: You ___ to buy so many things. We already have enough.
questions.explanation: Present necessity নেই → 'needn't'।

questions.question: He ___ smoke heavily, but now he has quit.
questions.explanation: অতীত অভ্যাস (এখন নেই) → 'used to'।

questions.question: You ___ pay the bill by tomorrow. It's your duty.
questions.explanation: Moral duty → 'ought to'।

questions.question: How ___ you speak to your mother like that!
questions.explanation: 'How dare you!' = সাহস করে কীভাবে! (anger/disbelief)

questions.question: I ___ go now or I'll miss the bus.
questions.explanation: Strong advice → 'had better' (না গেলে বাস মিস)।

questions.question: Error: 'You needn't to go there.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Needn't' modal → এর পরে 'to' লাগে না। 'You needn't go there.'

questions.question: Error: 'She used to smoked a lot.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Used to' → এর পরে V1 (base form)। 'used to smoke' হবে, 'smoked' নয়।

questions.question: Error: 'He ought not go there.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Ought to' negative = 'ought not to'। 'He ought not to go there.'

questions.question: Error: 'You had better to see a doctor.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Had better' → এর পরে 'to' ছাড়া V1। 'You had better see a doctor.'

questions.question: Fill: 'You ___ have bought so many. It was unnecessary.' (ক্রয় করেছ, কিন্তু দরকার ছিল না)
questions.explanation: অপ্রয়োজনীয় past action → 'needn't have + V3'।

questions.question: Fill: 'I ___ to play cricket when I was young.'
questions.explanation: 'Used to' = past habit। 'I used to play cricket.'

questions.question: Fill: 'You ___ finish your homework before playing.'
questions.explanation: 'Ought to' = উচিত।

questions.question: Fill: 'I ___ rather stay home than go out.'
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' = বরং পছন্দ।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'তোমার চিন্তা করার প্রয়োজন নেই।'
questions.explanation: 'Needn't' = প্রয়োজন নেই।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে আগে ধূমপান করত, কিন্তু এখন ছেড়ে দিয়েছে।'
options: He used to smoke, but now he quit.
questions.explanation: 'Used to' = past habit (এখন নেই)।
